hero.hero_title: JADID JOURNALISM AND MODERN MEDIA STUDIES PROCEEDINGS OF THE INTERNATIONAL SCIENTIFIC AND PRACTICAL CONFERENCE
hero.hero_desc: We are pleased to introduce the proceedings of the International Scientific and Practical Conference “Jadid Journalism and Modern Media Studies,” held on January 19, 2026. This conference aims to: Study scientific research in the field of Jadid literature and journalism and their significance in today’s media landscape; Discuss modern media studies, communication strategies, and development trends of mass media; Provide opportunities for the exchange of scientific and practical experience.

footer.footer_title: JADID JOURNALISM AND MODERN MEDIA STUDIES
footer.dev: The website was developed by Silicon Hub & Atom Innovations.
